mapper.sql: c.id, c.title, c.description, c.contest_type, c.status, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.created_by, c.create_time, c.update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oj_contest (title, description, contest_type, status, start_time, end_time, created_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{contestType}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oj_contest_problem cp WHERE cp.contest_id = c.id) AS problem_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oj_contest_participant p WHERE p.contest_id = c.id) AS participant_count FROM oj_contest c WHERE c.id = #{id}
